Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Sarah Mitten and Mary Helen Atkins in this Women's Senior Pro Quarterfinal Match.

Video.summary: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Dave Weinbach & Mari Humberg in this Mixed Pro Split Age Semifinal match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: Eva Welsher & Kyle Yates faced off against Milan Rane & Mircea Morariu in a Mixed Pro split age Quarterfinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age

Video.summary: It's Bobbi Oshiro and Megan Fudge versus Mari Humberg and Martina Frantova in a Women's Pro Doubles match at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2023.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles

Video.summary: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the second "South Indian derby" in World Pickleball League Season 2 as the undefeated table-toppers, Chennai Super Champs, face off against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The drama unfolds at Mumbai's Jio World Garden with high-velocity matches, including a premier showdown between unbeaten singles stars Rika Fujiwara and Shawn Mendes. Every rally is a tactical masterclass, featuring the "beast from the East" Lee Hwang Nam in a high-stakes mixed doubles battle against Caitlin Hart and Louis Laville. From "sensational lobs" to the strategic intensity of men's singles, this tie showcases the pinnacle of professional pickleball as both teams fight for dominance on the leaderboard.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) action heats up on Day 4 with a crucial clash between the Hyderabad Superstars and Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. The commentary team emphasizes that the winner of this tie has the potential to go level on points with the table toppers, making this a vital match for semi-final qualification.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1

Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of men’s and women’s doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.title: Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik

Image.alt: Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik
Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik
Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Week 3, Day 2 matchup of the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Liberty University facing Carnegie Mellon University. Liberty enters the match strong, having already secured wins in women's doubles. The broadcast highlights the Men's Doubles game where Liberty's Derek Kraje and Ben Rice dominate with a 11-6 victory, utilizing aggressive net play and strategic resets.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - January 3 2023 - All Stars Mixed Doubles

Tuesday Night Pickleball - January 3 2023 - All Stars Mixed Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - January 3 2023 - All Stars Mixed Doubles

Video.summary: October 10, 2023 - Welcome to week 3 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Tempe Tornadoes face-off against the Surprise Stingers.
Video.title: October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 10, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: In Week 4 of Season 2, the Arizona Pickleball League brings another exciting Tuesday night match at The Orchard. This week, the Peoria Pythons take on the Surprise Stingers, with thrilling moments and intense competition. Featuring standout players like Ryan Trefry, Lauren Mercado, Michael Lloyd, and Nico Montoya, the teams face off in a high-energy battle. From dynamic mixed doubles to powerful gender doubles, every set and game keeps viewers at the edge of their seats. Will the Pythons maintain their momentum, or will the Stingers make a dramatic comeback? Don’t miss this action-packed match full of strategy, drama, and plenty of pickleball!
Video.title: Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya

Image.alt: Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya
Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya
Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya

Video.summary: Pickleball star Ryan Sherry & former NFL linebacker Brandon Siler vs. pickleball star Lew Halski & former NFL linebacker David Pollack.

S01E05 - The Playoffs

Video.summary: This episode of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, features a redemption match between the Sarasota Manatees and the Lakeland Palms. Both teams are coming off a loss and are looking for a win in this intense doubles matchup. The Manatees jump out to an early lead, but the Palms, with strong play from players like Ava and Ashley Griffith, manage to crawl back into the game and make it a nail-biting finish. The episode features courtside commentary from Jay Carroll and Hugh Greene.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Video.summary: Heisman Trophy winning quarterback Danny Wuerffel & Pickleball pro Kyle Yates compete against US Olympian Casey Patterson & Pickleball pro Chuck Taylor in the final game of Picklebowl 2022.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4

Video.summary: The 2022 Picklebowl offers an unforgettable mixed doubles match featuring some of the biggest names in sports. US Olympian Casey Patterson and pickleball pro Chuck Taylor join forces to take on pickleball standout Megan Fudge and former tennis world No. 5 Kevin Anderson. Set against the scenic backdrop of Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event blends elite pickleball play with charity and college pride. Expect explosive rallies, pinpoint accuracy, and powerful serves in this high-energy exhibition that showcases the crossover appeal of pickleball.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Video.summary: It's Pickleball pro Matt Manasse & NFL Quarterback Drew Brees versus Pickleball Pro Lew Halski & former NFL player Matt Stinchcomb.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2

Video.summary: Catch the exhilarating Men's Pro Doubles match from the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville! Witness incredible action on the Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida, the paradise coast for pickleball. This thrilling match features the dynamic duo of John Cangelosi and Michael Leonard against their formidable opponents. Get ready for intense rallies, powerful shots, and strategic play from top professional pickleball players. Don't miss this must-watch event from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Video.summary: Filmed at the US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, this Pro Women’s Doubles matchup features the powerhouse mother-daughter team Leigh and Anna Leigh Waters, known for their aggressive tactics and flawless communication. They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Video.summary: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Video.summary: Watch a Mixed Pro Age pickleball match between the team of Shelby Bates and a partner against the team of Rob Contratto and Renee Chang. This video highlights a matchup of athletes with diverse athletic backgrounds. The caption file reveals that Rob Contratto was a professional ice hockey player and Renee Chang played rugby and soccer in college. Catch all the dinks, volleys, and strategic plays as these two teams battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
